title: cymba calyculata
intro: Cymba calyculata, also known as the lesser marshwort or lesser marsh cress, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cymba calyculata include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Cymba calyculata is often used as a tincture or decoction, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
